ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "web_site" TEXT /* URL of the course web site */,
  "organization" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization offering the course */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of educational program (degree or non-degree) */,
  "instructor_names" TEXT /* Names of the instructors teaching the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course can be accessed (e.g., Browser) */,
  "other_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the course (e.g., start anytime) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the course */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization and search (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content */,
  "course_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the course (in hours) */,
  "enrollment_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the course starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the course ends */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Any prerequisites required for the course */,
  "course_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the course */,
  "course_video_url" TEXT /* URL to the introductory video of the course */,
  "course_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the course */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_organization FOREIGN KEY ("organization") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_names FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_names") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "org_website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "org_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "org_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the organization's logo */,
  "org_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "org_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "org_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "org_established_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "instructor_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the instructor */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the instructor is associated with */,
  "instructor_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the instructor's profile image */,
  "instructor_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the instructor */,
  "instructor_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the instructor */,
  "instructor_website" TEXT /* URL to the instructor's personal or professional website */,
  "instructor_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* The user's location */,
  "user_languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the user */,
  "user_education_level" TEXT /* The highest level of education completed by the user */,
  "user_interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_courses" (
  "user_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-course relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the user enrolled in the course */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the user completed the course (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the course (e.g., enrolled, completed, dropped) */,
  "progress" REAL /* Percentage of the course completed by the user */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time of the last access to the course */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user to the course */,
  "user_review" TEXT /* Review text given by the user to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_courses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., topic, level, format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_tags_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
